===[[Pokémon Stadium 2]]===
Will appears as a member of the Elite Four in [[Pokémon Stadium 2]]'s Johto [[Gym Leader Castle]]. Due to the more competitive nature of the game, Will also uses several non-Psychic Pokémon in it, although most of them still know Psychic [[move]]s.

During the game's [[Game credits|end credits]], he is seen having a battle with [[Sabrina]] at the [[Saffron Gym]].
